name: Roper Technologies
analysis: ROP's 9-SMA is above the 26 and price has reclaimed them. It is coming off a base, 42% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Volume is expanding (1.4× the 20-day average) — real participation. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry $332.4200, stop $316.9089, target $368.3310 (2.32:1) — then trail it.
